name: MemoryLoom
description: MCP memory server with persistent context across sessions

MEMORYLOOM_BACKUP_ON_WRITE.description: Enable rolling backups on each write

MEMORYLOOM_BACKUP_RETENTION.description: Number of backup files to retain

MEMORYLOOM_HEALTH_PORT.description: Optional health endpoint port exposing /health and /ready (uses $PORT automatically)

MEMORYLOOM_MAX_TOOL_CALLS_PER_MINUTE.description: Optional global per-minute tool call limit (0 disables)

MEMORYLOOM_WEB_UI.description: Enable web UI for setup and configuration
